title: galatella illyrica
intro: Galatella illyrica, also known as the Illyrian galatella or autumn snowflake, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galatella illyrica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
